prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **Busso 3.2L V6 (936 A4.000)** with a **Forgestar F2 custom crankshaft** (88mm stroke) and **JE Pistons 8.5:1 forged slugs** to achieve 3.6L displacement, paired with **Ferrea Competition Series intake/exhaust valves** and **Supertech valve springs/retainers** for 8,500 RPM reliability. Port and polish the **Alfa Romeo 156 GTA cylinder heads** with **3-angle valve seats** and **flow-optimized combustion chambers** by **Spiess Motorsport** (Germany).

Forced Induction: Install a **Rotrex C38-91 centrifugal supercharger** (12psi peak) with a **custom billet aluminum intake manifold** (designed by **Autotecnica Motori**) and **Siemens 1000cc injectors**, controlled via **Alfa Romeo GTA-spec Bosch Motronic ME7.3.1 ECU** reflashed by **Autodelta** (UK) with **individual cylinder trims** and **launch control**. Pair with a **GReddy intercooler core** (400x200x76mm) and **Vibrant 14801 silicone couplers**.

Drivetrain: Swap the stock **Getrag 6-speed (M32)** for a **Graziano VT2-250 6-speed sequential** (from Alfa Romeo 8C Competizione) with **AP Racing CP8450 twin-plate clutch** and **Peloquin LSD (45% lock)**. Reinforce the **Alfa Romeo GT-specific subframe** with **Custom Cages bolt-in triangulated braces** and **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 8510K)** for rigidity. Use **Brembo GT 380mm 6-piston calipers** (from Alfa Romeo Giulia Quadrifoglio) with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**.
estetica: Body: Install the **Novitec Rosso Alfa GT widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser) with **custom 30mm spacers** to fit **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 19x9.5 ET25 (front) and 19x11 ET15 (rear)** wheels. Paint in **PPG Alfa Rosso Competizione** with **matt clear coat** and **carbon fiber hood (Seibon CF-ALFGT-010)**.

Aero: Add a **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (1,200mm width, 300mm chord) with **adjustable carbon fiber endplates** and **dual-element Gurney flaps**. Front canards by **AIT Racing (ALF-001)** and **custom aluminum undertray** with **diffuser tunnels** (designed by **Liberty Walk**).

Interior: Replace stock seats with **Recaro Pole Position II (Alcantara/leather)** in **Alfa Rosso with black stitching**, paired with **Sparco 6-point harnesses (EVO III)** and **custom roll cage (Custom Cages 8-point bolt-in)**. Install a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)** with **Alfa Romeo 8C Competizione shift knob** and **Aim Solo 2 DL GPS data logger** integrated into the **Alfa Romeo GT-specific dashboard overlay (by Defi)**.
